ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city/town */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city the ward belongs to */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ward */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the ward */,
  "last_election_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout in the last election in the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wards_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "pct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward the precinct belongs to */,
  "pct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the precinct */,
  "last_election_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout in the last election in the precinct */,
  "voting_booth_count" INTEGER /* Number of voting booths in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "educational_background" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "political_experience" TEXT /* Political experience of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "pct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "blank_votes" INTEGER /* Number of blank votes cast */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout for the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "invalid_votes" INTEGER /* Number of invalid votes cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES election_metadata ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_pct_id FOREIGN KEY ("pct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("pct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_others" (
  "other_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 'All Others' entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result the 'All Others' entry belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast for 'All Others' */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("other_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_others_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_others_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES election_metadata ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_metadata" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "number_of_candidates" INTEGER /* Number of candidates in the election */,
  "number_of_precincts" INTEGER /* Number of precincts participating in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version (e.g., changes made) */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who modified the result */,
  "modified_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who modified the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_result_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_result_versions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result the change was made to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the change (e.g., who made the change) */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "modified_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id")
)
